skill.name: landing-page-design
skill.description: Guides creation of distinctive, conversion-focused landing pages with vibe discovery, section composition, animation guidance, and quality checks.
skill.summary: Design distinctive landing pages with structured creative direction and conversion-focused sections.
skill.author: 2389-research

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported command execution, weak cryptography, and reconnaissance patterns, but review found they are Markdown formatting and design prose. The only residual concern is benign external browsing for fonts and inspiration, so publication is acceptable with low risk.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backticks Misclassified
low_findings.description: The backticks are Markdown fences and inline labels for design prompts. No Ruby, shell execution, or command invocation is present. Verdict: false positive. Confidence: 0.94. Confidence reasoning: The flagged lines are prose examples, not executable code, and SKILL.md contains no script runtime.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged lines are Markdown examples or inline terms. No executable Ruby or shell context exists in the skill file.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Crypto Pattern Matches Prose
low_findings.description: The weak cryptography alerts match ordinary design words and content headings. No cryptographic API, hashing function, or encryption logic is present. Verdict: false positive. Confidence: 0.92. Confidence reasoning: Context shows natural-language design guidance, not DES, MD5, SHA1, or similar implementation use.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line context is descriptive Markdown. I did not find evidence of cryptographic code or algorithm selection.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Reconnaissance Terms Are Design Text
low_findings.description: The reconnaissance alerts occur in checklist and layout guidance, such as font checks and visual grid instructions. No host, user, network, or system discovery commands appear. Verdict: false positive. Confidence: 0.9. Confidence reasoning: The lines are design workflow text with no command syntax or data collection behavior.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged wording is embedded in design guidance. No evidence found for system reconnaissance intent or commands.

low_findings.title: External Design Resource Browsing
low_findings.description: The skill recommends browsing font and design inspiration sites. This is normal for a design skill but may involve external network access. Confidence: 0.72. Confidence reasoning: The instructions name third-party resources, but they do not request secrets or hidden data transfer.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The skill explicitly references external design sites. The risk is limited because there is no exfiltration endpoint or secret access instruction.

content.value_statement: Generic landing pages can weaken trust and reduce conversions. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through creative direction, page structure, and polish checks.
actual_capabilities: Guides a vibe discovery process before page implementation.
Defines hero, feature, proof, pricing, CTA, and footer sections.
Suggests color, typography, layout, and motion directions.
Provides prompt patterns for hero sections and section additions.
Includes quality checks for responsiveness, accessibility, and conversion clarity.
limitations: It provides design guidance, not a complete design system package.
It may require external inspiration or font browsing.
It does not validate business claims or product-market fit.
It depends on user context for brand, audience, and offer details.

use_cases.title: Launch a SaaS Homepage
use_cases.description: Create a homepage with a strong hero, proof points, product benefits, pricing, and conversion-focused calls to action.

use_cases.title: Refresh a Product Launch Page
use_cases.description: Turn a generic page into a distinctive campaign page with a clear visual direction and stronger section flow.

use_cases.title: Build Client Landing Pages Faster
use_cases.description: Use repeatable prompts and checks to guide creative direction, section design, animation, and final presentation.

prompt_templates.title: Start Vibe Discovery
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner prompt for a new page.
prompt_templates.prompt: Guide me through vibe discovery for a landing page. Ask the required questions, then summarize the visual direction before coding.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Hero Direction
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a hero section direction for my product. Include headline style, layout, color palette, typography, motion, and primary CTA treatment.

prompt_templates.title: Expand the Page Structure
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate prompt for a complete landing page.
prompt_templates.prompt: Build the landing page section plan from the approved hero. Include benefits, social proof, how it works, pricing, final CTA, and footer guidance.

prompt_templates.title: Audit and Polish the Landing Page
prompt_templates.prompt: Review the page for visual distinction, responsive behavior, accessibility, animation quality, and conversion clarity. Recommend focused improvements only.

output_examples.input: A founder needs a landing page for an AI meeting assistant.
output_examples.output: The skill produces a vibe spec, hero concept, section sequence, visual rules, and a checklist for conversion and polish.

output_examples.input: A marketer wants a launch page that avoids generic startup styling.
output_examples.output: The skill defines anti-patterns, selects unexpected influences, and creates a distinctive design direction for the page.

output_examples.input: A designer needs to improve a finished page before handoff.
output_examples.output: The skill reviews responsiveness, imagery, animation, contrast, calls to action, and section hierarchy.

best_practices: Answer the vibe discovery questions before requesting implementation.
Provide real brand, audience, product, and conversion goals.
Review mobile, desktop, imagery, contrast, and calls to action before launch.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for a generic landing page without brand context.
Do not reuse default fonts, colors, and icon sets without review.
Do not add decorative motion that weakens readability or performance.

faq.question: Does this skill generate complete landing pages?
faq.answer: It guides the design and implementation process. The final output depends on the host tool and project setup.

faq.question: Can it work for SaaS products?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes guidance for SaaS homepages, launches, pricing, proof, and conversion sections.

faq.question: Does it require external websites?
faq.answer: Not always. It suggests external fonts and inspiration sources when useful for stronger visual direction.

faq.question: Is this useful for non-designers?
faq.answer: Yes. The discovery questions and checklists help non-designers make clearer design decisions.

faq.question: Will every page look different?
faq.answer: The skill pushes for a unique visual direction each time, but the user must provide specific context.

faq.question: Does it include accessibility guidance?
faq.answer: Yes. The quality checklist includes responsive behavior, color contrast, image loading, and performance checks.
